final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: editorial photo
Asset type: fashion editorial for Vogue Italia, high-end magazine spread
Primary request: powerful fashion portrait of a tall Nordic woman in black leather trench coat on Iceland's black sand beach
Scene/backdrop: Reynisfjara black sand beach, basalt column formations, waves crashing against dark volcanic rocks, sea mist drifting
Subject: tall Nordic female model with flowing long hair blown by sea wind, wearing premium designer black leather long trench coat over white turtleneck knit sweater, chunky-heeled leather boots, strong confident pose, profile looking upward toward horizon
Style/medium: medium format film photography, Vogue Italia editorial aesthetic
Composition/framing: medium shot, 85mm lens, shallow depth of field at f/2, model positioned against basalt columns
Lighting/mood: natural overcast daylight, dramatic and moody atmosphere, leaden gray sky
Color palette: unified dark tones - lead gray sky, black volcanic sand, black leather coat, white knit accent, cool desaturated palette
Materials/textures: smooth premium leather, soft knit fabric, wet black sand, rough basalt stone, sea spray mist
Constraints: maintain dark tonal unity, model as focal point with strong posture, wind-blown hair motion
Avoid: oversaturated colors, warm tones, plastic-looking leather, washed-out sky, amateur posing, excessive retouching
